title: How I Made $1,523 from Miso Soup?

transcript.text: He took a bowl of miso soup and poured it over the bars of his prison cell. Day after day he repeated this process pouring more and more soup onto the iron bars. And this is a real escape story that caught my eyes immediately. I knew I could make thousands of dollars if I just create a video about it. So I took the viral video structure from my competitor, rewrote the script using Claude AI prompt just like this one, and send the video to my animator immediately. But because each animation takes us 12 to 18 hours to complete, all I have to do next is wait. And the same way the prisoner was able to break through the bars of his prison cell, this video broke from a 15 K views jail, got 10 million views, made us $500 on YouTube, and another $1,000 from TikTok. So drop me a follow because I have more than 100 videos with over 10 million views that I break down on my Instagram page.
